projectDescription: A CLI tool to install, update, and manage AI skills for Claude Code and Codex.
keyFeatures: Install AI skills from GitHub URLs with a single command
Update all installed skills or specific skills across targets
Support for both Claude Code and Codex environments
Automatic skill directory management and source tracking
Partial success handling for multi-target operations
publicApiSurface: tailor-code-review skill - Automated code review for git branches
tailor-mermaid-to-drawio skill - Convert Mermaid diagrams to Draw.io XML
